allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add MR backtest post-analysis and reporting modules

- analysis.py: pure-compute functions \(to_dataframe, compute_performance_metrics,
  compute_round_trips, compute_code/state_distribution, exit_type_stats,
  execution_quality, print_summary\)
- plots.py: matplotlib-based plots \(equity curve, state/codes, trade PnL,
  exit breakdown, holding distribution, slippage\)
- Updated __init__.py with analysis/plots exports
- Added 24 tests in test_mr_report.py

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
